creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for contributing a new FreeBSD Ports Konstantin.

A few review items:

- Port should be named (/PORTNAME) after its PyPI name (https://pypi.python.org/pypi/influxdb). Directory should be py-PORTNAME

- Use MASTER_SITES=CHEESESHOP (PyPI) unless there is a compelling reason to use an alternate source (Eg: GitHub). Examples include if important (eg: test) files are missing from the PyPI source distribution (sdist)

- Combine RUN_DEPENDS lines using \ as the entry/line separator

- Add TEST_DEPENDS (matching setup.py:tests_requires or test dependencies) and if possible a working do-test: target that runs the test suite (even if it fails)
